“Y-yes… but I do-don’t want you to let… go…”

Phew.

That could have been bad.

But the sight that welcomed me was something else.

Her ass trembled so violently that it was like she was being electrocuted. I couldn’t help but admire the view I had created beneath me.

And wanna know the best part?

Haha.

“Haa… Haa…”

She took deep, deep breaths. So deep her chest was rising so high up as her own chest size.

It was a mesmerizing sight, and it was a miracle that I hadn’t cum by now. But I was sure I would have if her ass had tightened even a little more.

She looked at me, her eyes hazy and all confused, as she asked in a shaky tone, “Wh-why did… you… sh-stop? Ar-are you do-done?”

She must have known I didn’t cum, so she must be wondering why I had stopped even when I hadn’t released anything inside of her.

Zara looked below at her legs, now lying straight on their own, as her hands were also lethargically set on her sides. Her eyes widened immediately as she quickly replied…

“Fault or not. You have to be punished, Zara.”

I said, keeping a smile on my face, but there must have been something in my eyes because Zara’s whole body quivered.

~~

“Ja-Jack… Why here? And why… like this?”

Zara asked, her voice shaky and afraid.

Now, one could wonder what I could possibly do in a world without sexual knowledge that would make one feel embarrassment and humiliation?

I mean, even if I told her to walk throughout the castle naked, the only complaint she would have is that the commoners would see her dignified, noble body.

Nothing more, nothing less. So, what could I have possibly done to warrant such a question?

So…

I led Zara out into the private garden where she was the other day when I came to her for the first time in this castle. It was late at night, so there was barely anyone in the wing, and even if someone was there, they did nothing but glance at us once, since Zara was with me, even if she was buck naked from head to toe.

Up until that moment, it was fine. It all changed when we entered the garden. I told Zara to get into a certain position that would make it a little difficult for her to walk, but I wasn’t expecting her to feel humiliated from that.

Hence the question…

“Wh-why do I have to be on my kn-knees and hands like a mon-monster?”

Yeah, I forgot; animals didn’t exist in this world.

“It’s your punishment, Zara, remember?”

Zara quivered as she replied, “But Jack… this is undignified… for a noble lady such as myself.”

“It may be, but this is your punishment, remember? You shouldn’t have let go of your legs if you didn’t want to be punished.”

“Th-that was because you…”

“Because I what?”

“…”

Zara didn’t argue anymore and got into position, on all fours, her knees on the stones in the garden path as well as her hands, like an animal.

She hesitated greatly, her face showing great discomfort, but did as she was told.

Her heavy tits hung down, and her plump ass was raised high.

The position made her feel exposed, but I could bet all my fortune she didn’t give a single fuck about that. What mattered to her was the animal, or the monster treatment, in that world’s view.

I summoned something from my inventory, a mana crystal and a piece of monster remains, a horn to be exact, and used them to create a study bowl.

I used a skill to create artificial water from mana and placed the bowl on the ground, placing it in front of Zara, “Drink. But only from your mouth, no hands.”

Zara probably couldn’t understand that part, because people here didn’t groom animals, so she probably wasn’t familiar with how animals are usually fed.

But, for some reason, her cheeks burned red as she lowered her head, her long black hair falling around her face, and she began lapping at the water like a dog.

Even though she couldn’t understand, the act itself might have felt somewhat degrading. A noblewoman on all fours, here in an open garden where anyone could see, being commanded by a commoner, her supposed servant, and making her drink water in such a demeaning way that she wasn’t familiar with, but for some reason struck her pride. Still, she continued, even though her pride screamed at her, the cool water dripped from her chin onto the grass.

Haha.
